description:
Description:
Start your day right with Dolphy Electric Kettles, perfect for quick and easy hot beverages at home, hotels, or motels. Known for quality and efficiency, Dolphy offers rapid boiling, ergonomic design, and advanced safety features. Reliable and stylish, our kettles make heating water effortless for any occasion.
Choose Dolphy for a convenient and delightful experience every morning.
Specification:
Product Code:
DKTL0036
Material:
High-Grade ABS
Color:
Black
Capacity:
1.0L
Power:
1350-1500W
Voltage:
220-240V, 50/60Hz
Features:
Efficient 360° Concealed Heating Element
: Ensures rapid heating and easy cleaning, enhancing safety and performance.
Compact 1.0L Capacity
: Perfect for quick boiling, making it ideal for personal use, small gatherings, or travel.
Durable High-Grade ABS Construction
: Built to withstand daily use while providing a sleek and stylish appearance.
Powerful Heating Performance
Versatile Design
: Suitable for use in hotels, motels, or home kitchens, adding convenience to your daily routine.
